chain.thought: Explanation: The condition of being both exclusively interim and exclusively permanent at the same time is logically impossible. In the table, John 'Tune' Kristiansen is the only coach with an interim stint (caretaker for one league match) as well as permanent stints at other times, so he is not exclusively interim nor exclusively permanent simultaneously. No coach meets the stated condition.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The table lists head coaches with their tenures and notes indicating status. Only one explicitly interim tenure is shown: John 'Tune' Kristiansen as a caretaker from 18 June 2012 to 23 June 2012. Other entries represent permanent appointments (e.g., Ole Mørk, Ebbe Skovdahl, Anders Theil, etc.). No coach is described as being both exclusively interim and exclusively permanent at the same time, which is a contradictory condition. Therefore, no one fits the criteria.
